chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4487 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.18721/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.18722/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.18723/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 17.9.2025 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sarohi advocat4e for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner has challenged the show cause notice dated 14.2.2025 issued against him by the office of the Superintendent of Police, PHQ East Zone Saudabad Complex, Karachi, which is at page 27 of the file. It is noted that the domicile of the petitioner is from Punjab and not from Sindh. The competent authority shall proceed with its proceedings, which have been started by the aforesaid show cause notice and take them to their logical conclusion strictly in accordance with law. However, the I.G. Police Sindh is directed to scrutinize the original domiciles of all the police constables of Sindh to the extent as to whether they originally belong to the Province of Sindh or they obtained the domiciles later on to obtain the job and on such report appropriate order shall be passed after hearing the delinquent police constables performing duties in the Sindh Police. A copy of this order shall be sent to the I.G. Police Sindh, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
